expo.name: Venues V
expo.description: Venues V — Venue operations platform for Australian hospitality businesses. Manage zones, tasks, issues, and team communication across your venues.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Venues V uses your camera to capture issue and task photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Venues V accesses your photo library to attach photos to issues.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Venues V saves proof photos to your camera roll.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Venues V sends alerts for new issues, task updates, and team messages.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Venues V to save photos to your library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Venues V to save proof photos to your camera roll.

plugins.photosPermission: Venues V accesses your photos to attach them to issues and tasks.
plugins.cameraPermission: Venues V uses your camera to capture issue and task photos.
